title: John K. Carmack
extract: John Kay Carmack has been a general authority of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints since 1984. He is currently an emeritus general authority and was the managing director of the church's Perpetual Education Fund (PEF) from 2001 to 2012.
extract_html: John Kay Carmack has been a general authority of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints since 1984. He is currently an emeritus general authority and was the managing director of the church's Perpetual Education Fund (PEF) from 2001 to 2012.
